name: FEATURE
description: An idea for a new or improved operation or behavior

name: QUALITY
description: An idea for a new or changed non-functional requirement

name: EPIC
description: A container for a group of interdependent proposals.

name: MAINTENANCE
description: A routine housekeeping chore in this repository only

name: #draft
description: A preliminary proposal, put forward for early feedback

name: #proposed
description: A proposal being negotiated with stakeholders

name: #accepted
description: A proposal approved and queued for implementation

name: #rejected
description: A proposal that will not be taken forward

name: #released
description: A proposal whose changes are live in production

name: #deprecated
description: A previously released proposal that is no longer in effect
